pi_items.source: task_utils.sh and setup_task.sh confirm that agent 000 is the Wazuh manager container, and the task explicitly targets agentId=000.
The task instructions and URL routing (WAZUH_URL_SCA='https://localhost/app/configuration-assessment') confirm the module is Security Configuration Assessment (SCA).

privileged_info_summary: The task interacts with real CIS Benchmark compliance data automatically generated by Wazuh's Security Configuration Assessment (SCA) scan against its own container's OS. The target agent ID is verified to be 000 (the Wazuh manager itself), and the target module is accurately identified as Security Configuration Assessment.
